actorOrTaskId.title: Actor ID/Name or Task ID/name
actorOrTaskId.description: ID or name of the Actor or Task to run. Tasks enable you to choose your build etc.

actorInput.title: Actor Input (JSON)
actorInput.description: JSON object representing the input to pass to the Actor when running it.

buildNumber.title: Build Number (optional)
buildNumber.description: Specific build number to run. If not provided, the latest build will be used.

memoryConfigs.title: Memory Configurations (MB)
memoryConfigs.description: List of memory configurations (in MB) to test the startup latency with.

iterationsPerConfig.title: Iterations per Configuration (for statistical significance)
iterationsPerConfig.description: Number of times to run the Actor for each memory configuration to get an average startup latency.
